about.title: About Zilmer
about.intro:
With over 60 years of experience, Zilmer is a consolidated Brazilian company in the transformer market. Serving major clients with customised solutions for energy utilities, steel mills, the petroleum sector, mining, metro rail systems, automotive industries, power substations, and others. Developing special solutions in both primary and auxiliary applications.

Given the recent expansion of the global energy sector and new technological challenges, its technical expertise and know-how have been in high demand across Brazil and South America. Recognised for the reliability of its equipment and qualified technical support, the company is a reference in technological innovation, optimisation of production processes, and the strengthening of partnerships with major clients and international partners.
